packages.title: Capital, Crown & Kashmir
packages.shortDescription: Explore Delhi, Agra, and Kashmir in one unforgettable journey through history and snow-clad valleys.

packages.title: Kerala Backwaters Bliss
packages.shortDescription: Cruise tranquil backwaters, sip cardamom tea on misty hills, and unwind in God's own country.

packages.title: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey
packages.shortDescription: Live like royalty across pink cities, blue alleys, golden dunes, and shimmering lake palaces.

packages.title: Goa Beach Getaway
packages.shortDescription: Relax on sun-kissed beaches and enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Goa.

packages.title: Andaman Tropical Escapade
packages.shortDescription: Crystal clear waters, pristine beaches, and underwater wonders.

packages.title: Himalayan Foothills Serenity
packages.shortDescription: Spiritual awakening and nature trails in the Himalayan foothills.

packages.title: Sikkim & Darjeeling Delight
packages.shortDescription: Majestic Kangchenjunga views, tea gardens, and Buddhist monasteries.

packages.title: Punjab Heritage & Pride
packages.shortDescription: Golden Temple spirituality, Wagah Border patriotism, and vibrant culture.

packages.title: Mystical Meghalaya
packages.shortDescription: Living root bridges, crystal clear rivers, and the Scotland of the East.

packages.title: Vibrant Gujarat
packages.shortDescription: White desert, Asiatic lions, and rich textile heritage.

packages.title: Spiritual Varanasi
packages.shortDescription: Experience the divine energy of the world's oldest living city.

packages.title: Karnataka Coasts & Coffee
packages.shortDescription: Lush coffee plantations meeting pristine beaches.

packages.title: Tamil Nadu Temple Run
packages.shortDescription: Dravidian architecture, rock-cut caves, and cultural heritage.

packages.title: Ladakh High Altitude Adventure
packages.shortDescription: High mountain passes, crystal clear lakes, and ancient monasteries.

packages.title: Maharashtra Magic
packages.shortDescription: Bustling city life, hill stations, and historical forts.
